hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', d.get('file_path', ''))
if f and f.endswith('.py') and 'generated' not in f:
    if 'samples' in f:
        subprocess.run(['.venv/bin/python', '-m', 'ruff', 'check', '--fix', '--force-exclude', f], capture_output=True)
    subprocess.run(['.venv/bin/python', '-m', 'ruff', 'format', '--force-exclude', f], capture_output=True)
"

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',d.get('file_path','')); banned='skyflow/generated'; (sys.stderr.write('BLOCKED: Fern-generated code — do not edit manually\n'), sys.exit(2)) if banned in p else sys.exit(0)"
